design_systems.name: Zen Design System

layers.principles: done — one-red rule, epistemic hygiene, motion as rhetoric
layers.foundations: done — full token set, 5-font stack, Breath System
layers.components: partial — Path Card, Metric Row, Step Card, Tab Bar
layers.patterns: partial — insurance narrative lane, HumComm strip

key_rules: Earn your colour — default greyscale, colour must mean something
One red rule — one accent only, used sparingly
7 tests — every component must pass before shipping
Motion as rhetoric — animation must communicate, not decorate

design_systems.name: shadcn/ui + Radix UI
design_systems.components: 25+ primitives — accordion, dialog, dropdown, select, tabs, tooltip, etc.

design_systems.name: Magic Patterns
design_systems.purpose: Design prototyping to code — use as SSOT for visual direction
design_systems.workflow: Create board → store URL in registry → generate code → track drift
